sizing_rule.note: Use optimal f formula f = P - Q/B when win/loss sizes differ. Example: 60% win rate with 2:1 ratio yields f=0.2 (risk 20% of capital per trade). Formula: P = probability of win, Q = probability of loss, B = avg_win/avg_loss ratio.

source_rule_text: Position sizing must account for unequal win and loss sizes; use the simplified f formula when winners and losers differ in magnitude.
